title: verbascum varians var. varians
intro: Verbascum varians var. varians, also known as mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family and is native to Europe and Asia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the plant's leaves and flowers have been employed for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of mullein include relieving coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Mullein can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
